title: Mother of Flies
review: This film was made by the Adams family, and I think it's the 11th film they have written, directed and starred in together. You've got to respect that, and I hope they make many more, and get even more freaky. It is as you'd expect for the low budget: underwhelming filmically, and in terms of acting and editing. No music was an interesting choice, but I think I would have been more engaged with even something subtle and ambient. Without music, time seems to stand still as you watch, and every scene takes place in the same woodland with the same crows cawing in the distance.
